# ToolZen — Complete Tool Reference

> Free online tools — privacy-first, no upload needed. All processing happens in your browser.
> Available in Chinese (zh) and English (en). URLs follow /{lang}/{slug}/ pattern.
> Total: 21 tools across 6 categories.

## Developer Tools

### JSON Formatter
Online JSON formatting, validation, and compression tool. Supports syntax highlighting and error detection.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/json-formatter/

### Base64 Encoder/Decoder
Online Base64 encoding and decoding tool. Supports text-to-Base64 conversion.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/base64/

### UUID Generator
Online UUID v4 and ULID generator. Supports batch generation and one-click copy.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/uuid-generator/

### RegEx Tester
Online regular expression testing tool. Real-time match highlighting with common pattern library.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/regex-tester/

### Color Picker
Online color picker and converter. Supports HEX, RGB, and HSL format conversion.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/color-picker/

### Unix Timestamp Converter
Online Unix timestamp to datetime converter. Real-time current timestamp with second and millisecond precision.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/timestamp-converter/

## Text Tools

### Text Diff Checker
Online text diff comparison tool. Side-by-side and unified views. Standard diff algorithm.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/text-diff/

### Word Counter
Online word and character counting tool. Real-time stats for characters, words, lines, and paragraphs.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/word-counter/

### Case Converter
Online text case and script converter. Supports upper/lowercase, title case, simplified/traditional Chinese.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/case-converter/

## Image Tools

### QR Code Generator
Free online QR code generator. Supports URL, text, custom colors and size. Download as PNG.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/qr-code/

### Image Compressor
Online image compression tool. Supports PNG, JPEG, and WebP formats. All processing local.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/image-compress/

## Crypto & Encoding

### MD5 / SHA Hash Generator
Online MD5, SHA-1, and SHA-256 hash generator. Supports text and file hashing.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/md5-hash/

### URL Encoder/Decoder
Online URL encoding and decoding tool. Quick convert special characters via encodeURI and decodeURI.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/url-encode/

### Password Generator
Online random password generator. Custom length and character types. Uses crypto.getRandomValues().
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/password-generator/

## Calculators

### Mortgage Calculator
Online mortgage calculator. Equal payment and equal principal methods. Detailed amortization schedule.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/mortgage-calculator/

### BMI Calculator
Online BMI calculator. Enter height and weight to calculate BMI and health status (WHO standards).
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/bmi-calculator/

### Date Calculator
Online date calculator. Visual calendar selection for day counting, workdays, and date math.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/date-calculator/

### Timezone Converter
Online timezone converter. Display current time across multiple timezones simultaneously.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/timezone-converter/

### Age Calculator
Online age calculator. Precisely calculates age in years, months, and days with next birthday countdown.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/age-calculator/

### Unit Converter
Online unit converter. 6 categories: length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed. 34 units total.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/unit-converter/

## Life Tools

### Zodiac & Constellation Finder
Online Chinese zodiac and Western constellation finder. Enter birth date to discover your signs.
URL: https://tool-zen.com/zh/zodiac-finder/

## About ToolZen
ToolZen is a collection of free online tools. "Zen" represents simplicity — good tools should be simple, clean, and unobtrusive. Unlike many similar sites, all ToolZen tools run locally in your browser. Your data is never uploaded to a server because we have no backend servers at all. We aim to be the go-to online toolbox for developers, designers, and everyday users.
